name: Label
summary: A form label component built on Radix UI LabelPrimitive with dark mode support and disabled states.
detailedDescription: Label provides accessible form labels using Radix UI's LabelPrimitive.Root. The component applies text-sm size with medium font-weight for clear readability. Colors adapt to theme - black text in light mode, white in dark mode. Leading-none line-height ensures tight vertical spacing. Disabled state support via peer-disabled selector shows not-allowed cursor and 70% opacity when associated input is disabled. The component uses React.forwardRef for proper ref forwarding, enabling focus management from parent components. ClassName merging via cn() utility allows custom styling overrides. This is a foundational form primitive that pairs with Input, Select, Textarea, and other form components to create accessible, properly-associated label-input pairs. Essential for forms requiring WCAG compliance and proper semantic HTML structure.
behavior: Applies disabled styles via peer selector
recommendations: Suitable for performance-sensitive pages that still need polished visuals.
